title.en: China-to-Niger Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入尼日尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入尼日：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Niger ARSE energy-sector licensing, NIGELEC grid-connection review, national conformity and IEC-adoption context, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, off-grid and mini-grid IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol expectations, and 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid settings versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与尼日尔ARSE能源行业许可、NIGELEC并网审查、国家合格评定及IEC采纳背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口证据、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、离网和微电网IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol要求，以及50 Hz / 220-380 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與尼日ARSE能源行業許可、NIGELEC併網審查、國家合格評定及IEC採納背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面證據、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、離網和微電網IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol要求，以及50 Hz / 220-380 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Niger national conformity determination, ARSE licence or authorisation decision, NIGELEC grid-connection approval, donor/lender procurement approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, IPPs, mini-grid developers, and installers should verify current Niger laws, ARSE requirements, NIGELEC connection conditions, national standards adoption, donor/lender specifications, and applicable IEC evidence with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、尼日尔国家合格评定裁定、ARSE许可或授权决定、NIGELEC并网批准、捐助方/贷款方采购批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、独立发电商、微电网开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行尼日尔法律、ARSE要求、NIGELEC接入条件、国家标准采纳状况、捐助方/贷款方规格和适用IEC证据。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、尼日國家合格評定裁定、ARSE許可或授權決定、NIGELEC併網批准、捐助方/貸款方採購批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、獨立發電商、微電網開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼日法律、ARSE要求、NIGELEC接入條件、國家標準採納狀況、捐助方/貸款方規格和適用IEC證據。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Niger, the key practical gaps are: (1) Niger national conformity and standards-adoption review, because IEC evidence is normally the usable technical language but local acceptance must be confirmed; (2) ARSE licence or authorisation treatment for regulated generation, distribution, mini-grid, and sale-of-electricity activities; (3) NIGELEC connection approval for grid-tied systems on the 50 Hz / 220-380 V network; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (5) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence; (6) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (7) extreme Sahel heat, dust, and derating evidence, including operation at 45 C or higher where project specifications require it. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but does not automatically satisfy Niger national, ARSE, NIGELEC, or donor/lender project acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口尼日尔时，主要实际差距包括：（1）尼日尔国家合格评定和标准采纳审查，因为IEC证据通常是可用的技术语言，但仍须确认当地接受性；（2）受监管发电、配电、微电网和售电活动的ARSE许可或授权处理；（3）接入50 Hz / 220-380 V电网的并网系统须取得NIGELEC接入批准；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（5）IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727并网接口证据；（6）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（7）萨赫勒极端高温、沙尘和降额证据，包括项目规格要求时45 C或更高温度运行证据。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景资料，但不会自动满足尼日尔国家、ARSE、NIGELEC或捐助方/贷款方项目验收。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口尼日時，主要實際差距包括：（1）尼日國家合格評定和標準採納審查，因為IEC證據通常是可用的技術語言，但仍須確認當地接受性；（2）受監管發電、配電、微電網和售電活動的ARSE許可或授權處理；（3）接入50 Hz / 220-380 V電網的併網系統須取得NIGELEC接入批准；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（5）IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727併網介面證據；（6）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（7）薩赫勒極端高溫、沙塵和降額證據，包括項目規格要求時45 C或更高溫度運行證據。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景資料，但不會自動滿足尼日國家、ARSE、NIGELEC或捐助方/貸款方項目驗收。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
